untranslatable_reason: The signal requires explicit detrending via subtraction (close - sma_20) or calculation of 20-day price differences (p_i - p_i-20) to create a synthetic detrended oscillator, then peak/valley detection on this derived series. The allowed operators do not support arithmetic operations (subtraction) or custom indicator construction. The backtest engine would need to support derived/synthetic indicators or arithmetic expressions to fully implement this cycle detection method.
translation_notes: Approximated using price crossovers above/below sma_20 as a proxy for cycle identification in ranging markets, but this does not capture the intended detrending methodology or peak/valley detection logic described in the signal. A proper implementation requires the ability to construct (close - sma_20) as a detrended price series and identify extrema within it.
